plain_language.en: Short medical checkup (Level 2) for a regular patient
plain_language.es: Chequeo médico corto (Nivel 2) para paciente establecido
plain_language.fr: Consultation médicale courte (Niveau 2) pour patient régulier
plain_language.hi: नियमित मरीज के लिए छोटी स्वास्थ्य जांच (स्तर 2)
plain_language.zh: 常规复诊患者的简短医疗评估（二级）
plain_language.pt: Check-up médico curto (Nível 2) para paciente estabelecido

notes: Established patient office visit, 10 minutes, straightforward clinical decision making.
